mapper.select: SELECT r.COMPANY AS company, r.REQ_ID AS requestId, r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AS empCode, r.TARGET_DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS workDate, r.REQ_GROUP AS requestCategory, CASE WHEN r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE ELSE r.REQ_TYPE END AS requestWorkCode, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, r.STATUS AS status, r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE AS requesterCode FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID WHERE r.REQ_ID = #{requestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, REQ_GROUP, REQ_TYPE, REQUESTER_EMP_CODE, TARGET_EMP_CODE, REQUESTER_DEPT_CODE, TARGET_DEPT_CODE, TARGET_DATE, REASON, REASON_DETAIL, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, CASE WHEN #{requestCategory} = 'OTHER' THEN 'OTHER' ELSE 'GENERAL' END, CASE WHEN #{requestCategory} = 'OTHER' THEN 'SHIFT_CHANGE' ELSE #{requestWorkCode} END, #{requesterCode}, #{empCode}, #{requesterDeptCode}, #{deptCode}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), #{reason}, #{reasonDetail}, #{status}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, START_TIME, START_TIME_TYPE, END_TIME, END_TIME_TYPE, WORK_MIN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), #{startTimeType}, CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), #{endTimeType}, CASE WHEN #{endTimeType} = 'N1' THEN 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME)) ELSE ABS(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME))) END, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, #{requestWorkCode}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 SET REQ_TYPE = CASE WHEN REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN 'SHIFT_CHANGE' ELSE #{requestWorkCode} END, REASON = #{reason}, REASON_DETAIL = #{reasonDetail}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND COMPANY = #{company}

UPDATE HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 SET START_TIME = CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), START_TIME_TYPE = #{startTimeType}, END_TIME = CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), END_TIME_TYPE = #{endTimeType}, WORK_MIN = CASE WHEN #{endTimeType} = 'N1' THEN 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME)) ELSE ABS(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME))) END, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND COMPANY = #{company}
UPDATE HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPT_CODE

SELECT SHIFT_CODE AS shiftCode, SHIFT_NAME AS shiftName, WORK_DAY_TYPE AS workDayType, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), WORK_ON_HHMM, 108) AS workOnHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108) AS workOffHhmm, CASE WHEN WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN WORK_OFF_HHMM >= WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, WORK_ON_HHMM, WORK_OFF_HHMM) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, WORK_ON_HHMM, WORK_OFF_HHMM) END - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, BREAK1_START_HHMM, BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, BREAK2_START_HHMM, BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0)) ELSE 0 END AS workMinutes FROM HRTSHIFTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ, SHIFT_CODE

SELECT LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.WORK_ON_HHMM, 108), 5) AS workOnHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108), 5) AS workOffHhmm FROM HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE WHERE tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) AND s.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND s.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL

SELECT CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END FROM HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE WHERE tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE))

WITH SubDepts AS ( SELECT DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND USE_YN = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 d INNER JOIN SubDepts s ON d.PARENT_DEPT = s.DEPT_CODE WHERE d.COMPANY = #{company} AND d.USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SubDepts ORDER BY DEPT_CODE OPTION (MAXRECURSION 20)
